events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario. Let's parse. Scenario: Photos of Spool erection & fit-up show several completed pieces, but area count and remaining scope not listed. Submitted package does not include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Reference material: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Stage rough-complete. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since missing quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint, cannot verify completeness. No defects described. So decision likely needs_more_info. Risk low? No hazards. Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions empty. percent_complete unknown maybe 0? But can estimate? Since no area count, cannot estimate. Could set 0 or maybe 50? The schema says numeric estimate. Since insufficient info, maybe 0. value 0. confidence low. findings: missing quantity takeoff / area count; cannot verify percent complete or remaining scope against iso drawings. actions: submit quantity takeoff and remaining scope list; reconcile with iso drawings. rationale. references ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Need ensure no prose outside JSON.

No defects are cited, so the risk is low, but the checkpoint cannot be passed until the missing documentation is provided.", "references": ["ASME B31.3", "project iso drawings"]}
